title: Icy Garlicky Canadian Lettuce Toast
description: A quick and easy Canadian dish featuring crispy toast, garlicky sauce, and fresh lettuce, perfect for a snack or light lunch. This egg-free friendly recipe is a great option for those with dietary restrictions.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the bread into 1/2 inch thick slices and toast until crispy.
Mince the garlic and mix with mayonnaise, lemon juice, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
Add the water to the bowl and mix until a smooth sauce forms.
Chill the sauce in the refrigerator for 10 minutes.
Wash and dry the lettuce leaves.
Assemble the toast by spreading the garlicky sauce on each slice, then topping with lettuce.
Garnish with additional lettuce leaves if desired.
